meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Overcome No Marketing Skills (Case Study)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn how to design with AI, leverage Antigravity, and use Claude Code to ship high-converting assets as a solo freelancer.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree; you need an automated design stack. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative design refinement, you can generate professional-grade marketing assets in minutes. This workflow replaces manual design hours with high-leverage prompts that convert visitors into paying clients.
content.intro:
The screen is blank, the deadline is breathing down your neck, and you're staring at a landing page that looks like a relic from 2012. As a freelancer, your code is flawless, but your marketing design is invisible. The gap between a functional product and a profitable one isn't just features—it's the aesthetic authority that signals trust to your clients.

But what if you didn't have to hire a designer or spend weeks learning Figma? By treating design as a code-first engineering problem, you can leverage AI to bridge the gap. We’re moving beyond simple templates; we are building a repeatable, AI-driven design engine that creates high-converting assets while you focus on the logic that makes your SaaS actually work.

steps.title: Define the Marketing Persona
steps.description: Before writing code, use AI to map out your target audience's pain points. This ensures every UI element serves a conversion goal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the target audience of a [Project Type] and generate a list of 5 high-converting psychological triggers for the hero section.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Draft a conversion-focused copy strategy based on the target persona for my SaaS landing page.'

steps.title: Generate UI Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the structural skeleton of your marketing site using modern Tailwind components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive landing page layout using React and Tailwind CSS featuring a hero section, feature grid, and pricing table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx antigravity-cli init --framework react --style tailwind'

steps.title: Inject Visual Hierarchy
steps.description: Refine the generated code to ensure visual balance and contrast, mimicking professional SaaS design standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a professional color palette and typography scale to my existing React components to improve conversion focus.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Update CSS classes to enforce a 8px grid system and improve visual hierarchy in the hero section.'

steps.title: Automate Responsive Testing
steps.description: Use Claude Code to identify and fix layout regressions across mobile and tablet breakpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current code for mobile responsiveness issues and suggest CSS adjustments for better alignment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npx playwright test --ui' and then 'claude fix --file landing-page.tsx'

steps.title: Iterative Conversion Optimization
steps.description: Perform A/B testing on your copy and CTA placement to maximize lead generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest 3 variations of the primary CTA button text and placement based on current conversion best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Implement A/B test variations for the hero CTA and add analytics tracking for click-through rates.'

pro_tips: Always use a consistent design system variable file; don't hardcode hex colors in your components.
Use Claude Code to auto-generate JSDoc comments for your marketing components to maintain long-term scalability.
Treat your marketing copy as code: version control your landing page text to track which iterations convert best.
Prioritize 'above-the-fold' load speed by using Claude Code to audit and prune unused CSS classes.
Leverage AI to generate synthetic user testimonials to fill out your social proof section before you have real clients.
content.next_steps: Once your landing page is live, set up a simple analytics dashboard to track conversions and iterate on your design components using the same Claude Code workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting poor design hold back your freelance revenue. Master the AI-driven workflow that turns developers into full-stack product leaders. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
